## Environment

- Taurent version:
- Artifact used:
- OS:
- Architecture:
- qBittorrent version:
- qBittorrent connection type: localhost / LAN / remote HTTPS / reverse proxy

## Result

- [ ] Installed or launched successfully
- [ ] Connected to qBittorrent
- [ ] Torrent list loaded
- [ ] Basic torrent action worked
- [ ] Settings opened
- [ ] App quit cleanly

## Problems Found

Describe any install warnings, crashes, UI bugs, connection problems, or unexpected behavior.

## Notes

Anything platform-specific that future release notes should mention?
